title: Experience Level Overload
description: Gain more Health/Strength/Defense/Speed (and more) based on your EXP level.
body:
Your stats change based on your current experience level, up to level 100 (after level 100, your stats will no longer increase). If your experience level decreases (due to death, enchanting, anvils, etc.), your stats will decrease as well. All coded stats are based on Minecraft’s vanilla attributes, which you are likely familiar with. Below is the full table of all affected attributes, including their values and scaling information.

| Attribute                      | Default | Max (100 EXP) | Per Level | Scaling    |
| ------------------------------ | ------- | ------------- | --------- | ---------- |
| Health                         |      20 |            40 |      0.20 | Increasing |
| Armor                          |       0 |            12 |      0.12 | Increasing |
| Armor Toughness                |       0 |             8 |      0.08 | Increasing |
| Attack Damage                  |       0 |       20 (+1) |      0.20 | Increasing |
| Attack Speed                   |       4 |           6.4 |     0.024 | Increasing |
| Sweeping Damage Ratio          |       0 |          0.25 |    0.0025 | Increasing |
| Block Break Speed              |       1 |             2 |      0.01 | Increasing |
| Block Interaction Range        |     4.5 |           5.5 |      0.01 | Increasing |
| Entity Interaction Range       |       3 |             4 |      0.01 | Increasing |
| Burning Time                   |       1 |             0 |     -0.01 | Decreasing |
| Oxygen Bonus                   |       0 |           2.5 |     0.025 | Increasing |
| Safe Fall Distance             |       3 |             5 |      0.02 | Increasing |
| Fall Damage Multiplier         |       1 |          0.75 |   -0.0025 | Decreasing |
| Movement Speed                 |     0.1 |           0.2 |     0.001 | Increasing |
| Jump Strength                  |    0.42 |          0.64 |    0.0022 | Increasing |
| Knockback Resistance           |       0 |           0.6 |     0.006 | Increasing |
| Explosive Knockback Resistance |       0 |           0.5 |     0.005 | Increasing |
| Luck                           |       0 |            64 |     0.064 | Increasing |

Command list:

/ELO stats = gives you all the bonus values based on your current experience level and your current attribute values (counting everything).

/ELO toggle = turns on/off all bonus attributes, this option is global and not per world.

This mod may cause issues with other mods that interact with player attributes. However, it is implemented using bonus modifiers, meaning base attribute values are not changed.
